nasb.text: And He *said to them, “Do you not understand this parable? How will you understand all the parables?

esv.text: And he said to them, “Do you not understand this parable? How then will you understand all the parables?

cnv.text: 耶穌又對他們說：“你們不明白這個比喻，怎能明白一切比喻呢？

ccb.text: 耶稣又对他们说：“你们不明白这个比喻，又怎能明白其他比喻呢？

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“你们不明白这个比喻，又怎么能领会所有的比喻呢？
